content:
First note that

 p(5)+p(25)=a(5³+25³)+b(5²+25²)+c(5+25)+2d  
  =15750 a+650 b+30 c+2d=1906  

so

 7875 a+325 b+15 c+d=953.  

On the other hand

 p(15)=3375 a+225 b+15 c+d.  

Eliminate d by subtracting the two equations:

 p(15)–(7875 a+325 b+15 c+d)=3375 a+225 b+15 c+d – (7875 a+325 b+15 c+d)  
 =953–(7875 a+325 b+15 c+d)–4500 a–100 b  
 ⇒ p(15)=953–4500 a–100 b.  

Write k=45a+b∈ℤ, then

 p(15)=953–100k ≡53 (mod 100).  

The multiples of 100 shifted by 53 closest to 0 are …,–147,–47,53,153,…, so the minimal absolute value is |–47|=47.  

Answer: \boxed{47}.
